# Ac Impedance

**Summary**: An electrochemical technique that measures the resistance and capacitance of a system at various frequencies.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-shokoya|Shokoya, 1994]] used AC impedance to characterize corrosion behavior in both static and dynamic conditions, especially for high-resistance media.

- Used to separate resistive and capacitive elements of the corrosion reaction to determine the mechanism. ([[1994-shokoya|Shokoya, 1994, p. 44]])
